Register no. 05930

Homiletical commentary — title page wanting

Place and date unknown · Dropsie / JCR series (attributed)
Possible
The evidence

Each row is one thing we can point to in the book, and what corroborates it outside the book. The chain is the record.

What
Card-catalog annotation
Where in the book
—
What it says
“ex JCR? — check Offenbach”
Corroborated by
Freidus card catalog, Dropsie College ↗
Confidence — Possible

The only trace is a pencilled note on a catalog card. No marking survives in the book itself — and the title page, where one would expect a stamp, is gone. We record it so the possibility is visible rather than lost. This is a thin case, and we show it as thin.

Catalog record
not in Franklin
Series
Dropsie / JCR
Former owner
not identified
Penn Libraries · Provenance of looted books · prototypeUncertainty in this record is shown, not hidden.
